question: Watering hole attack
canonical_answer: security exploit in which the attacker seeks to compromise a specific group of end users by infecting websites that members of the group are known to visit. The goal is to infect a targeted user's computer and gain access to the network at the target's place of employment.

appears_in.title: Comptia Certmaster Practice For Security+
appears_in.answer: is a directed social engineering attack. It relies on the circumstance that a group of targets may use an unsecure third party website.
